Name: D6 GIF Keys
Description: Animated GIF on stream deck keys for FIFINE D6 and StreamDock. Speed control, counter, open URL.

com.rkfsociety.d6gifkeys.counter.Name: Counter
com.rkfsociety.d6gifkeys.counter.Tooltip: Increments a number on each key press

com.rkfsociety.d6gifkeys.openurl.Name: Open URL
com.rkfsociety.d6gifkeys.openurl.Tooltip: Opens the configured URL in your browser

com.rkfsociety.d6gifkeys.gifbutton.Name: GIF Button
com.rkfsociety.d6gifkeys.gifbutton.Tooltip: Shows an animated GIF on the D6 key with adjustable playback speed
